---
title: Thanks 

format: html
---

Credits to the artists of the following images:

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![[ゆきどけアゼリア](https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/50046630) by キツネイロ, slightly post-processed](/assets/images/netherstairs.jpg)

![[春眠](https://www.pixiv.net/artworks/3791197) by ＄](/assets/images/sleep.jpg)

![香霖堂 from 《東方求聞史紀　～. Perfect Memento in Strict Sense.》, fetched from [THBWiki](https://thwiki.cc/%E4%B8%9C%E6%96%B9%E6%B1%82%E9%97%BB%E5%8F%B2%E7%BA%AA/%E9%A6%99%E9%9C%96%E5%A0%82)](/assets/images/kourindou.jpg)

![八雲藍 from 《東方文花帖 ～ Bohemian Archive in Japanese Red.》，fetched from [THBWiki](https://thbwiki.cc/%E4%B8%9C%E6%96%B9%E6%96%87%E8%8A%B1%E5%B8%96%EF%BC%88%E4%B9%A6%E7%B1%8D%EF%BC%89/%E5%85%AB%E4%BA%91%E8%93%9D)](/assets/images/ran.jpg)

![ICPC meme by folklore (probably AI-generated), heavily post-processed](/assets/images/icpc.jpg)
:::

Above images might be post-processed to some extent. Feel free to raise claims if you are the original artist and want to be credited in other forms, or have your work removed.

Other images on this site, unless otherwise stated, should be either AI-generated or drawn by myself. For the AI-generated portions, most of them are generated by [zukiCuteILL_v50](https://civitai.com/models/1437224/zuki-new-cute-ill) with edits by Gemini Nano Nanana.
